scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:dev --workspace=packages/server" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/web" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/web-dashboard" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/web-patient"
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:up && npx wait-on tcp:localhost:5432 -t 30000 && npm -w packages/server run db:migrate && npm -w packages/server run db:seed
